reason: Agent successfully used the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username through the UI
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Super Agent dashboard showing three agents in the sidebar
Clicked on agent "QA-20260424-231126-wjvb" in the sidebar — Agent page loaded with status "idle" and message input ready
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator confirmed "idle" which meets the requirement of "running" or "idle"
Typed and sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Granted GitHub account access by clicking "Allow Access (1)" button — GitHub account permission granted successfully
Granted permission for GitHub API request "GET /user" by clicking "Allow Once" — API permission granted and agent resumed processing
Waited for agent response — Agent completed processing in 48 seconds and returned to "idle" status
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took final screenshot documenting the result — Screenshot shows complete chat history with agent response containing the GitHub username
